comment_text: Honestly the best decision I made this year. My grocery bill dropped by like $200/month and everything is actually GOOD quality. Thrive is the real deal.
author: @jenniferm_wellness

comment_text: Ordered on Monday, was told 3-5 business days. It's now day 9 and my order still shows 'processing'. Called customer service TWICE and got different answers each time. Unacceptable for a paid membership.
author: Robert K.

comment_text: Anyone else notice Thrive's prices have been creeping up? I compared my last 3 orders and my average item price went up about 8%. Still cheaper than Whole Foods but the gap is closing.
author: u/organic_on_a_budget

comment_text: My daughter has a severe tree nut allergy and I found tree nut traces in the 'nut-free' granola I ordered. This is a SERIOUS safety issue. I need someone to contact me immediately.
author: @amanda_r_safety

comment_text: I've been a member for 2 years and honestly can't imagine going back to regular grocery shopping. The selection for keto is unmatched and the prices are genuinely good. 5 stars.
author: Sarah T.

comment_text: Wait is this the same Thrive Market that was in that article about underpaying warehouse workers? Might want to address that before running feel-good ads...
author: @truthseeker_99

comment_text: Just switched from Misfits Market to Thrive and the difference in product quality is night and day. Misfits was fine for produce but their pantry staples were always close to expiration. Thrive everything is fresh.
author: u/pantry_snob

comment_text: Can someone explain why I'm being charged $59.95 when I signed up for the free trial? I specifically remember opting for the trial and now I see a charge on my credit card. This feels scammy.
author: @michael_disputes

comment_text: The GLP-1 friendly meal kits are a game changer. I'm 4 months into Ozempic and finding the right foods was so stressful before. Thrive's curated collections make it easy. Thank you for seeing this community.
author: Lisa M.

comment_text: Thrive Market is lowkey the best kept secret for people on GLP-1 meds. Their protein snack selection alone is worth the membership. Just placed my 6th order.
author: u/glp1_journey_2026

comment_text: I love the concept but the app keeps crashing every time I try to checkout. I've reinstalled twice and it's still happening. iPhone 15 Pro Max on latest iOS.
author: @techmom_sarah

comment_text: Cancelled my membership 3 months ago and I'm STILL being charged. I have emails confirming the cancellation. This is borderline fraud. Disputing with my bank.
author: James W.

comment_text: The sustainable packaging is what sold me. I was literally throwing away so much plastic from Amazon Fresh orders and feeling guilty. Every Thrive box is recyclable or compostable. THIS is how it should be.
author: @greenliving_kate

comment_text: Hot take: Thrive Market's private label products are actually better than most name brands. Their organic olive oil is legitimately excellent and it's like $8 vs $15 for the equivalent.
author: u/foodie_bargains

comment_text: Lol this ad keeps following me everywhere. I already have a membership! Maybe spend less on retargeting existing members and more on actually stocking the items that are always 'out of stock' 🙄
author: @already_a_member

comment_text: I received someone else's order. Completely different items than what I ordered. Customer service was quick to respond but said a replacement would take another 5-7 days. That's a total of 2 weeks without my groceries.
author: Patricia H.

comment_text: Earth Month promo brought me in and the quality is keeping me. Already on my third order. The cashew butter is INSANE. 🌱
author: @planteater_mike

comment_text: PSA: If you're comparing Thrive to Amazon Fresh — they're completely different markets. Amazon is convenience/speed. Thrive is curation/quality/values. Depends what matters to you. I use both for different things.
author: u/pragmatic_shopper

comment_text: My 80 year old mom figured out how to use Thrive Market before she figured out Netflix. That's how good the UX is. She orders every 2 weeks now and won't stop telling her book club about it 😂
author: @daughter_of_thrive_fan

comment_text: The membership auto-renewal is predatory. There's no clear way to cancel in the app and when you call they put you through a retention gauntlet. I just want to cancel without a 20 minute guilt trip.
author: David L.

comment_text: Anyone have issues with Thrive shipping to rural areas? I'm in Montana and shipping takes 8-10 days consistently. By the time stuff arrives the fresh items are questionable.
author: u/montana_homestead

comment_text: I'm a dietitian and I recommend Thrive to all my clients managing food allergies. The allergen filtering on the site is the best I've seen from any online grocery. Truly inclusive shopping experience.

comment_text: Not to be dramatic but Thrive Market's organic coffee selection literally changed my mornings. The Sumatra blend? Chef's kiss. ☕

comment_text: I ordered the 'clean protein' bundle and 2 of the 6 items were expired. EXPIRED. I'm paying a premium for quality and I get expired food? Attached photos of the expiration dates.

comment_text: Friendly reminder that Thrive Market donates a free membership for every paid one. I just think that's really cool. Not many companies actually put their money where their mission is.

comment_text: The before and after of my pantry since joining Thrive 🤩 Swipe to see the transformation. No more mystery ingredients!

comment_text: Anyone else's order arrive with items missing? This is the third time in a row. Each time I have to contact support and wait for a credit. It's getting old.

comment_text: Switching from Vitacost to Thrive was the best move. Yes the membership costs money but when you factor in the savings per item + free shipping threshold it pays for itself in 2 orders.

comment_text: Is the Thrive Market membership worth it if you're single? I feel like all the deals are bulk/family sized. I'm one person and I can't eat 48 protein bars before they expire lol

comment_text: I tried to use my $10 credit from the referral program and it says it's expired even though I just got the email 3 days ago. The email says 'valid for 30 days' but the site won't accept it.

comment_text: Thrive Market's customer service is genuinely excellent. Had an issue with a damaged item and they not only replaced it but sent me a sample of something new to try. That's how you build loyalty.

comment_text: I work in food CPG and Thrive's private label strategy is really smart. They're basically doing what Costco did with Kirkland but for the organic/natural segment. Margins must be excellent.

comment_text: Can we talk about how Thrive ships GLASS JARS with basically zero protection? Got a box today with broken pasta sauce all over everything. This is the second time. Please fix your packaging.

comment_text: Just did the math: I've saved $1,847 since joining Thrive 14 months ago compared to my old Whole Foods spending. The membership is $59.95/year. Not exactly a hard decision.

comment_text: The website says 'in stock' but when you go to checkout suddenly items are 'unavailable.' This happened with 4 items in my last order. Fix your inventory system.

comment_text: Thrive just launched a GLP-1 specific landing page and it's actually really good. Curated meal plans, protein calculations, even has a community section. Finally someone gets this audience.

comment_text: My husband thought the membership was a waste of money. After 3 months he now orders more than I do. Convert complete. 💚

comment_text: Cute ad but I cancelled after they charged me twice in one month and took 6 weeks to refund the duplicate charge. Good products ruined by terrible billing practices.

comment_text: I appreciate the mission but the product selection is limited compared to what I can get at my local co-op. For people without good local options I'm sure it's great but for me it doesn't add much.

comment_text: Controversial opinion: Thrive Market's packaging claims are kinda greenwashy? Like they say 'carbon neutral shipping' but do they actually offset or is it just a creative accounting thing? Would love to see the receipts.

comment_text: @cleanfoodjenna's unboxing video sold me. Just placed my first order. If even half the stuff is as good as she says I'm in.

comment_text: Tip for new Thrive members: the auto-ship feature saves an extra 5% AND you can customize the frequency. I set mine to every 3 weeks and it's basically replaced my entire grocery run except fresh produce.
